name: Sonos
philosophy: Sonos's web presence is premium-home-audio editorial — black-and-white product photography, generous lifestyle imagery in muted earth tones, and a clean white chrome with a single dark CTA. The atmosphere is design-magazine considered: speakers placed in beautifully styled rooms (often Scandi-modern), with the chrome receding so the lifestyle moment can breathe.

design_language.motion_signature: Editorial fade-in reveals on scroll. Carousel cross-fade at 1.2–1.5s. Hover lifts on product cards are minimal (slight 100ms opacity dip on the price line). No spring, no scale.

trademark_signals: Lifestyle photography in muted Scandi-modern interiors — the speaker placed in styled rooms
Pure black CTA on white — minimalist primary action
Saans typography (or close substitute) — modern geometric sans with humanist warmth
Rectilinear product cards (0–8px radius) — premium hi-fi aesthetic
Color-swatch picker on speaker product pages — white / black / shadow / soft palette
ai_slop_avoided: Don't add bright brand-accent colors — Sonos is monochrome chrome on muted lifestyle
Don't sharpen lifestyle photography into clinical product shots — the styled-room context is the brand
Don't add scroll-driven motion that competes with the lifestyle photography
